allow_retries_for_non_idempotent_methods: Allow retries for non-idempotent methods like POST/PATCH
allow_retries_for_post_patch_requests_ma: Allow retries for POST/PATCH requests (may create duplicate requests)
api_response_data_json_text_or_other_for: API response data (JSON, text, or other formats)
custom_headers_standard_headers_like_use: Custom headers (standard headers like User-Agent, Accept, etc. are added automatically)
describe_the_api_request_body_you_need: Describe the API request body you need...
http_response_headers_as_key_value_pairs: HTTP response headers as key-value pairs
initial_retry_delay_in_milliseconds_expo: Initial retry delay in milliseconds (exponential backoff)
maximum_delay_between_retries_in_millise: Maximum delay between retries in milliseconds
number_of_retry_attempts_for_retryable_f: Number of retry attempts for retryable failures
number_of_retry_attempts_for_timeouts_42: Number of retry attempts for timeouts, 429 responses, and 5xx errors (default: 0, no retries)
request_timeout_in_milliseconds_default_: Request timeout in milliseconds (default: 300000 = 5 minutes, max: 600000 = 10 minutes)
this_is_a_core_workflow_block_connect_to: This is a core workflow block. Connect to any external API with support for all standard HTTP methods and customizable request parameters. Configure headers, query parameters, and request bodies. Standard headers (User-Agent, Accept, Cache-Control, etc.) are automatically included.
